g.text: 4x TMC2209 Stepper Drivers | UART addressed | 2A RMS each | breadboard for logic
4x NEMA 17 Steppers | Yaw, Pitch, Roll, Belt | 6-to-4 pin cables
GND Bus Bar (250A, 5/16" stud) | PSU GND -> 14 AWG -> bus bar | 18 AWG to each driver GND
18 AWG each (VMOT, ring terminals to bus bar)
STEP/DIR (4 pairs) + UART shared bus (1k bridge) + 3.3V VIO
